testcase.name: extract_capsule_fw_version::extract_capsule_fw_version.py::file_exists
testcase.system-out: file=common/linux_scripts/extract_capsule_fw_version.py suite=extract_capsule_fw_version phase=case type=file_exists warning=False message=File exists

testcase.name: extract_capsule_fw_version::extract_capsule_fw_version.py::python_compiles
testcase.system-out: file=common/linux_scripts/extract_capsule_fw_version.py suite=extract_capsule_fw_version phase=case type=py_compile warning=False message=Python compilation succeeded

testcase.name: extract_capsule_fw_version::extract_capsule_fw_version.py::cli_no_args_fails
testcase.system-out: file=common/linux_scripts/extract_capsule_fw_version.py suite=extract_capsule_fw_version phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: /usr/bin/python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/linux_scripts/extract_capsule_fw_version.py Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 1 --- STDOUT --- Usage: python3 extract_capsule_fw_version.py <pattern> <file_path> --- STDERR ---

testcase.name: extract_capsule_fw_version::extract_capsule_fw_version.py::cli_invalid_regex_fails
testcase.system-out:
file=common/linux_scripts/extract_capsule_fw_version.py suite=extract_capsule_fw_version phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: /usr/bin/python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/linux_scripts/extract_capsule_fw_version.py Capsule=([0-9A-F]{4} /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/extract_capsule_fw_version/extract_capsule_fw_version/13_cli_invalid_regex_fails/input.log Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 1 --- STDOUT ---
--- STDERR --- Traceback (most recent call last): File "/home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/linux_scripts/extract_capsule_fw_version.py", line 54, in <module> hex_values = extract_hex_values(file_path, pattern) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "/home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/linux_scripts/extract_capsule_fw_version.py", line 35, in extract_hex_values match = re.search(pattern, line) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "/usr/lib/python3.12/re/__init__.py", line 177, in search return _compile(pattern, flags).search(string) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "/usr/lib/python3.12/re/__init__.py", line 307, in _compile p = _compiler.compile(pattern, flags) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "/usr/lib/python3.12/re/_compiler.py", line 745, in compile p = _parser.parse(p, flags) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "/usr/lib/python3.12/re/_parser.py", line 979, in parse p = _parse_sub(source, state, flags & SRE_FLAG_VERBOSE, 0) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "/usr/lib/python3.12/re/_parser.py", line 460, in _parse_sub itemsappend(_parse(source, state, verbose, nested + 1, ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "/usr/lib/python3.12/re/_parser.py", line 864, in _parse raise source.error("missing ), unterminated subpattern", re.error: missing ), unterminated subpattern at position 8
